name: The Oregonian
title_tag: Manage Your Business Information on TheOregonian with Synup
detailed_paragraph:
The Oregonian + Synup

Add, claim, edit business listings & reviews on The Oregonian with Synup's listings & review management tools.

What is The Oregonian?

The Oregonian is a respected source for news and information serving the state of Oregon. It provides comprehensive coverage of local news, events, politics, sports, and culture, catering to the informational needs of Oregon residents and those interested in developments in the state.

Why The Oregonian + Synup?

  • Complete Control Over Listings: With the ability to manage your business listings on The Oregonian, you maintain full control over your online presence, ensuring your business is represented accurately.
  • Broaden Your Reach: Adding your business to The Oregonian through Synup means increased visibility. Help potential customers discover you, effectively expanding your reach.
  • Accurate Business Information: Enhance trust and credibility by publishing accurate information on The Oregonian.
  • Customer Engagement: View and respond back to reviews on The Oregonian, fostering a positive relationship with your customers, showing that you value their feedback and are attentive to their needs.

How to integrate The Oregonian + Synup?

The Oregonian integration is available to all Synup listings plan subscribers. To view & manage The Oregonian integration:

  1. Visit the Listings tab on Synup's console.
  2. Navigate to the Premium Listings section.
  3. Click on The Oregonian logo to manage the Synup + The Oregonian integration and associated settings.
integration_summary: For businesses, managing location data on Facebook now a breeze with Synup.

seo.title: The Oregonian
